title: Wholesome Jamaican Bread Bake
description: A rich, gooey post‑workout Jamaican snack made with bread flour, spices, and a flambé rum glaze.
instructions: In a bowl combine warm milk, sugar, yeast and let sit 10 minutes until frothy.
Whisk bread flour, brown sugar, salt, smoked paprika, dried thyme and cinnamon into a dry bowl.
Add the frothy mixture, melted butter, and egg to the dry mixture and stir until dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 8 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover, and let rise in a warm place 30 minutes until doubled.
Punch the dough, divide into 6 equal portions, shape into small rounds and place on a parchment‑lined baking sheet.
Preheat the oven to 375°F and bake the rounds for 20 minutes until golden.
While the doughs bake heat rum in a small saucepan over medium, ignite with a long match to flambé and swirl.
Brush the flambéed rum over the warm bread and serve immediately.
